Fractal Incursion.name: Daily Fractal Incursion
Fractal Incursion.description: Complete  Fractal of the Mists in quickplay mode.

Fractal Incursion.name: Fractal Incursion Champion
Fractal Incursion.description: Earn fractalline dust by completing quickplay fractals and Fractal Incursion achievements.

Fractal Incursion.name: Messenger from the Mists
Fractal Incursion.description: Speak with the Mist Stranger in Lion's Arch to learn about the Fractal Incursion event and its rewards.

Fractal Incursion.name: Weekly Fractal Incursion
Fractal Incursion.description: Complete  Fractal of the Mists in quickplay mode.

Fractal Rush.name: Daily Fractal Rush
Fractal Rush.description: Complete  fractal in the Fractals of the Mists through the portal in Lion's Arch.

Fractal Rush.name: Fractal Rush Adept
Fractal Rush.description: Complete  different scale 1–20 fractal in the Fractals of the Mists through the portal in Lion's Arch.

Fractal Rush.name: Fractal Rush Champion
Fractal Rush.description: Earn Fractal Rush trophies by looting the final chest in fractals and completing Fractal Rush achievements.

Fractal Rush.name: Fractal Rush Elite
Fractal Rush.description: Complete  different scale 51–100 fractal in the Fractals of the Mists through the portal in Lion's Arch.

Fractal Rush.name: Fractal Rush Entrant
Fractal Rush.description: Speak with the Fractal Rush coordinator to learn about the event and its rewards.

Fractal Rush.name: Fractal Rush Veteran
Fractal Rush.description: Complete  different scale 21–50 fractal in the Fractals of the Mists through the portal in Lion's Arch.

Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.name: (Daily) Gnashbash "Birthday" Celebration: Dance
Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.description: Celebrate Evon's "birthday" by using /dance in the Vaults in Lion's Arch.

Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.name: Gnashbash "Birthday" Celebration: Checking In
Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.description: Speak with the Black Lion "Birthday" Manager in the Vaults in Lion's Arch.

Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.name: Gnashbash Heist: Bronze
Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.description: Earn a bronze medal in the Gnashbash Heist adventure during the Gnashbash "Birthday" Celebration event.

Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.name: Gnashbash Heist: Gold
Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.description: Earn a gold medal in the Gnashbash Heist adventure during the Gnashbash "Birthday" Celebration event.

Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.name: Gnashbash Heist: Not So Sneaky

Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.name: Gnashbash Heist: Silver
Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.description: Earn a silver medal in the Gnashbash Heist adventure during the Gnashbash "Birthday" Celebration event.

Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.name: Gnashbash Heist: Special Shiny
Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.description: Find a special shiny in the Gnashbash Heist adventure.

Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.name: Gnashbash Heist: The Shiniest
Gnashbash \"Birthday\" Celebration.description: Collect all of the shinies in the Gnashbash Heist adventure during the Gnashbash "Birthday" Celebration event.

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Adventure Guide: Volume Five
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description: Complete 12 Adventure Guide: Volume Five achievements.

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Completing Events V
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description:
Participate in  event in the Ruins of Orr, Frostgorge Sound, or Southsun Cove.

<c=@reminder>You can find events while exploring the world. Events in progress are marked by an orange circle on your map when you're nearby.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Completing Maps II
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description:
Complete 3 maps.

<c=@reminder>Map-complete rewards are special bonuses earned by visiting all points of interest, vistas, waypoints, hero challenges, and renown hearts on a map.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Completing Renown Hearts V
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description:
Complete  renown heart in Frostgorge Sound.

<c=@reminder>Renown hearts are marked with a golden heart icon on the map. Every renown heart is different, so check your HUD when nearby to find out how you can assist.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Completing Story Chapters IV
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description:
Complete chapter 7 of your story.

<c=@reminder>You can select your active story and view your progress from the Story Journal menu in the Hero panel.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Defeating Veterans in the Ruins of Orr
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description: Defeat  veterans in the Straits of Devastation, Malchor's Leap, or the Cursed Shore.

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Defeating World Bosses III
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description:
Defeat  of the world bosses in Frostgorge Sound or Mount Maelstrom.

<c=@reminder>World bosses are challenging events that appear at specific times of day across Tyria. Defeat them to receive chests containing rare equipment and crafting materials. </c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Defeating the Destroyers
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description: Defeat  Destroyer enemy in Mount Maelstrom.

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Defeating the Icebrood
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description: Defeat  Icebrood enemy in Frostgorge Sound.

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Defeating the Karka in Southsun Cove
Defeating the Risen in the Ruins of Orr
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description: Defeat  Risen enemy in the Straits of Devastation, Malchor's Leap, or Cursed Shore.

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Discovering Points of Interest in the Ruins of Orr
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description: Discover 5 points of interest in the Ruins of Orr, Frostgorge Sound, or Southsun Cove.

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Dodging Attacks V
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description:
Dodge  incoming attack from enemies.

<c=@reminder>Dodging allows you to evade incoming attacks by spending endurance to roll out of danger, making you temporarily invulnerable. "Evaded!" will appear over your character when you successfully dodge an attack.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Earning Crafting Levels IV
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description:
Earn 150 crafting levels.

<c=@reminder>Craft items to earn crafting experience for that crafting discipline, allowing you to create more powerful items.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Foraging Plants
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description:
Harvest  material from resource nodes in the Ruins of Orr, Frostgorge Sound, or Southsun Cove.

<c=@reminder>Resource nodes are clumps of ore, saplings, and plants that can be gathered using gathering tools. Nodes can be found by exploring the world.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Five.name: Viewing Vistas V
Adventure Guide: Volume Five.description:
View / vista in Ruins of Orr or Frostgorge Sound.

<c=@reminder>Vistas are scenic locations that show the world from a new perspective, and they are marked with a red triangle icon on the map.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Adventure Guide: Volume Four
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description: Complete 20 Adventure Guide: Volume Four achievements.

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Completing Events IV
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Participate in  event in Sparkfly Fen, Mount Maelstrom, Iron Marches, Fireheart Rise, or Timberline Falls.

<c=@reminder>You can find events while exploring the world. Events in progress are marked by an orange circle on your map when you're nearby.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Completing Jumping Puzzles
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Complete  jumping puzzle.

<c=@reminder>Jumping puzzles are discoverable environmental challenges that test your exploration and aerial abilities. Search these puzzles out to learn what secrets they hold!</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Completing Renown Hearts IV
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Complete  renown heart in Sparkfly Fen, Mount Maelstrom, Iron Marches, Fireheart Rise, or Timberline Falls.

<c=@reminder>Renown hearts are marked with a golden heart icon on the map. Every renown heart is different, so check your HUD when nearby to find out how you can assist.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Completing Story Chapters III
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Complete chapter 5 of your story.

<c=@reminder>You can select your active story and view your progress from the Story Journal menu in the Hero panel.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Defeating Veterans in Mount Maelstrom
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description: Defeat  veteran enemies in Mount Maelstrom.

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Defeating the Flame Legion
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description: Defeat  Flame Legion enemy in Iron Marches and Fireheart Rise.

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Defeating the Grawl, Hylek, Dredge, and Krait
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description: Defeat  grawl, hylek, dredge, or krait enemy.

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Defeating the Inquest
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description: Defeat  Inquest enemy in Mount Maelstrom and Sparkfly Fen.

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Defeating the Risen
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description: Defeat  Risen enemy in Mount Maelstrom and Sparkfly Fen.

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Discovering Points of Interest IV
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Discover 5 points of interest in Sparkfly Fen, Mount Maelstrom, the Iron Marches, the Fireheart Rise, or Timberline Falls.

<c=@reminder>Points of interest are special locations marked by name in the world, indicated by a square icon on the map. </c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Discovering Waypoints III
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Discover 5 waypoints in Sparkfly Fen, Mount Maelstrom, Iron Marches, Fireheart Rise, or Timberline Falls.

<c=@reminder>Waypoints allow you to travel quickly around the world. They are unlocked by visiting them once. You can teleport to any unlocked waypoint for a small amount of coin.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Dodging Attacks IV
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Dodge  incoming attack from enemies.

<c=@reminder>Dodging allows you to evade incoming attacks by spending endurance to roll out of danger, making you temporarily invulnerable. "Evaded!" will appear over your character when you successfully dodge an attack.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Earning Crafting Levels III
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Earn 75 crafting levels.

<c=@reminder>Craft items to earn crafting experience for that crafting discipline, allowing you to create more powerful items.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Entering World vs. World
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Enter  World vs. World map.

<c=@reminder>Storm castles and conquer territories in World vs. World! Enter the Mists from Eternal Battlegrounds asura gates in Lion's Arch, which can be traveled to from major cities, or by clicking the castle icon in the top-left corner of your screen.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Leveling Up IV
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Earn experience to level up this character to level 70.

<c=@reminder>Experience can be earned by defeating enemies, contributing to events and renown hearts, completing story chapters, and crafting items.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Logging Lumber
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Gather  material with a logging axe in Sparkfly Fen, Mount Maelstrom, the Iron Marches, Fireheart Rise, or Timberline Falls.

<c=@reminder>Resource nodes are clumps of ore, saplings, and plants that can be gathered using gathering tools. Nodes can be found by exploring the world.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Transmuting Skins
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Transmute  item.

<c=@reminder>Transmutation expends transmutation charges to replace the skin of a piece of equipment with a different one from your account wardrobe. Transmutation charges can be found in daily reward chests, earned by completing maps, or purchased from the Gem Store.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Using Combo Skills
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Use  combo skill.

<c=@reminder>Combo skills are performed by using a skill marked as a combo finisher while inside a combo field generated by another ability. Check the tooltips for your weapon and utility skills to find potential combinations!</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Using Food Consumables
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Use  consumable food item to obtain nourishment bonuses.

<c=@reminder>Food consumables boost attributes when eaten. Hover your mouse over a consumable to see what it does.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Using the Mystic Forge
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Create  item in the Mystic Forge.

<c=@reminder>The Mystic Forge transforms items in a variety of ways, including raising the tier of crafting materials and upgrading equipment. The forge can be accessed from major cities throughout Tyria.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Utility Consumables
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
Consume  utility item to obtain utility enhancements.

<c=@reminder>Utility consumables are items that increase specific combat abilities. Double-click utility consumables to use them.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Four.name: Viewing Vistas IV
Adventure Guide: Volume Four.description:
View / vista in Sparkfly Fen, Mount Maelstrom, Iron Marches, Fireheart Rise, or Timberline Falls.

<c=@reminder>Vistas are scenic locations that show the world from a new perspective, and they are marked with a red triangle icon on the map.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Adventure Guide: Volume One
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description: Complete 14 of the 16 Adventure Guide: Volume One achievements.

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Applying Conditions
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Apply  conditions to enemies.

<c=@reminder>Conditions are negative effects that apply damage and control effects in combat. Check the tooltip for your skills to determine if your attacks can apply conditions to enemies.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Completing Events I
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Participate in  event.

<c=@reminder>You can find events while exploring the world. Events are marked by an orange circle on your map when you're nearby.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Completing Renown Hearts I
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Complete  renown heart.

<c=@reminder>Renown hearts are marked with a golden heart icon on the map. Every renown heart is different, so check your HUD when nearby to find out how you can assist.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Discovering Points of Interest I
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Discover  point of interest in Queensdale, Metrica Province, Caledon Forest, Wayfarer Foothills, or the Plains of Ashford.

<c=@reminder>Points of interest are special locations marked by name in the world, indicated by a square icon on the map. </c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Dodging Attacks I
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Dodge  incoming attack from enemies.

<c=@reminder>Dodging allows you to evade incoming attacks by spending endurance to roll out of danger, making you temporarily invulnerable. "Evaded!" will appear over your character when you successfully dodge an attack.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Leveling Up I
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Earn experience to level up this character to level 10.

<c=@reminder>Experience can be earned by defeating enemies, contributing to events and renown hearts, completing story chapters, and crafting items.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Looting Enemies
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Loot  defeated enemies.

<c=@reminder>Sometimes enemies will drop items when defeated, indicated by a golden sparkle around their body. Interact with these enemies to loot these items and add them to your inventory.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Reviving Allies
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Revive  ally.

<c=@reminder>Downed or defeated players and allies can be revived by approaching and interacting with them to restore their health. Multiple people can revive the same ally at once to restore health faster.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Scouting the Area
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Speak with  scouts in Queensdale, Metrica Province, Caledon Forest, Wayfarer Foothills, or the Plains of Ashford to discover more about the local area.

<c=@reminder>Scouts appear with a spyglass icon on your map. They can point you toward nearby goals and landmarks when you speak to them.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: The Adventure Begins
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description: Enter Queensdale, the Plains of Ashford, Caledon Forest, Metrica Province, or Wayfarer Foothills for the first time.

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Using Emotes
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Use  emote to express yourself!

<c=@reminder>Emotes allow your character to show their feelings to the world. Type "/emotelist" in your chat for a list of possible emotes.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Using Healing Skills
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Use a healing skill  time.

<c=@reminder>Healing skills are located on the sixth skill slot of every character's skill bar.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Using Profession Mechanic Skills
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Activate your profession mechanic skills  times.

<c=@reminder>Profession mechanic skills appear above your weapon skills, and they have unique effects depending on your character's profession.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Using Waypoints
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
Travel using a waypoint.

<c=@reminder>Waypoints allow you to travel quickly around the world. They are unlocked by visiting them once. You can teleport to any unlocked waypoint for a small amount of coin.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume One.name: Viewing Vistas
Adventure Guide: Volume One.description:
View / vista.

<c=@reminder>Vistas are scenic locations that show the world from a new perspective, and they are marked with a red triangle icon on the map.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Adventure Guide: Volume Three
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description: Complete 13 Adventure Guide: Volume Three achievements.

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Completing Events III
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
Participate in  event in the Fields of Ruin, Blazeridge Steppes, Lornar's Pass, Dredgehaunt Cliffs, or the Harathi Hinterlands.

<c=@reminder>You can find events while exploring the world. Events in progress are marked by an orange circle on your map when you're nearby.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Completing Maps I
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
Complete  map.

<c=@reminder>Map-complete rewards are special bonuses earned by visiting all points of interest, vistas, waypoints, hero challenges, and renown hearts on a map.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Completing Renown Hearts III
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
Complete  renown heart in the Fields of Ruin, Blazeridge Steppes, Lornar's Pass, Dredgehaunt Cliffs, or the Harathi Hinterlands.

<c=@reminder>Renown hearts are marked with a golden heart icon on the map. Every renown heart is different, so check your HUD when nearby to find out how you can assist.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Completing Story Chapters II
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
Complete chapter 3 of your story.

<c=@reminder>You can select your active story and view your progress from the Story Journal menu in the Hero panel.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Defeating Elder Dragon Minions
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description: Defeat  Branded, Destroyer, Icebrood, or Mordrem enemy.

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Defeating Enemy Factions
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description: Defeat  centaur, Sons of Svanir, Inquest, Nightmare Court, or Flame Legion enemy.

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Defeating World Bosses II
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
Defeat  of the world bosses in Bloodtide Coast, Blazeridge Steppes, or Harathi Hinterlands.

<c=@reminder>World bosses are challenging events that appear at specific times of day across Tyria. Defeat them to receive chests containing rare equipment and crafting materials. </c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Discovering Points of Interest III
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
Discover 5 points of interest in the Fields of Ruin, Blazeridge Steppes, Lornar's Pass, Dredgehaunt Cliffs, or the Harathi Hinterlands.

<c=@reminder>Points of interest are special locations marked by name in the world, indicated by a square icon on the map. </c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Discovering Waypoints II
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
Discover 5 waypoints in in the Fields of Ruin, Blazeridge Steppes, Lornar's Pass, Dredgehaunt Cliffs, or the Harathi Hinterlands.

<c=@reminder>Waypoints allow you to travel quickly around the world. They are unlocked by visiting them once. You can teleport to any unlocked waypoint for a small amount of coin.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Dodging Attacks III
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
Dodge  incoming attack from enemies.

<c=@reminder>Dodging allows you to evade incoming attacks by spending endurance to roll out of danger, making you temporarily invulnerable. "Evaded!" will appear over your character when you successfully dodge an attack.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Earning Crafting Levels II
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
Earn 30 crafting levels.

<c=@reminder>Craft items to earn crafting experience for that crafting discipline, allowing you to create more powerful items.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Leveling Up III
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
Earn experience to level up this character to level 50.

<c=@reminder>Experience can be earned by defeating enemies, contributing to events and renown hearts, completing story chapters, and crafting items.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Mining Ore
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
Mine  ore with a mining pick from resource nodes in Dredgehaunt Cliffs, Harathi Hinterlands, or Blazeridge Steppes.

<c=@reminder>Resource nodes are clumps of ore, saplings, and plants that can be gathered using gathering tools. Nodes can be found by exploring the world.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Using Elite Skills
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
Use  elite skill.

<c=@reminder>Elite skills are powerful abilities assigned to the last slot of your skill bar.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Three.name: Viewing Vistas III
Adventure Guide: Volume Three.description:
View / vista in the Fields of Ruin, Blazeridge Steppes, Lornar's Pass, Dredgehaunt Cliffs, or the Harathi Hinterlands.

<c=@reminder>Vistas are scenic locations that show the world from a new perspective, and they are marked with a red triangle icon on the map.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Adventure Guide: Volume Two
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description: Complete 20 Adventure Guide: Volume Two achievements.

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Applying Dye
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Dye  piece of equipment.

<c=@reminder>Dye are colors that can be applied to equipped armor, outfits, mounts, and gliders, allowing you to personalize the look of your character. You can access your dyes from the Dye tab in your Hero panel.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Completing Events II
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Participate in  event.

<c=@reminder>You can find events while exploring the world. Events in progress are marked by an orange circle on your map when you're nearby.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Completing Renown Hearts II
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Complete  renown heart in Snowden Drifts, Diessa Plateau, Brisban Wildlands, or Kessex Hills.

<c=@reminder>Renown hearts are marked with a golden heart icon on the map. Every renown heart is different, so check your HUD when nearby to find out how you can assist.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Completing Story Chapters I
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Complete chapter 1 of your story.

<c=@reminder>You can select your active story and view your progress from the Story Journal menu in the Hero panel.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Crafting Items
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Craft  item.

<c=@reminder>Items can be crafted at crafting stations in cities and guild halls once you've been trained by an appropriate master craftsman. Crafting uses the crafting materials you collect from gathering nodes and defeated enemies as you explore the world.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Defeating Enemies II
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description: Defeat  enemy.

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Defeating World Bosses I
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Defeat  of the world bosses in Queensdale, Wayfarer Foothills, Metrica Province, or Caledon Forest.

<c=@reminder>World bosses are challenging events that appear at specific times of day across Tyria. Defeat them to receive chests containing rare equipment and crafting materials. </c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Depositing Materials
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Deposit items in your material storage.

<c=@reminder>Material storage is a tab within your account vault that allows you to store crafting materials for easy access when crafting. Items can be deposited directly to the material storage from your inventory at any time.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Discovering Points of Interest II
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Discover 5 points of interest in Snowden Drifts, Diessa Plateau, Brisban Wildlands, or Kessex Hills.

<c=@reminder>Points of interest are special locations marked by name in the world, indicated by a square icon on the map. </c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Discovering Waypoints
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Discover 5 waypoints in Snowden Drifts, Diessa Plateau, Brisban Wildlands, or Kessex Hills.

<c=@reminder>Waypoints allow you to travel quickly around the world. They are unlocked by visiting them once. You can teleport to any unlocked waypoint for a small amount of coin.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Dodging Attacks II
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Dodge  incoming attack from enemies.

<c=@reminder>Dodging allows you to evade incoming attacks by spending endurance to roll out of danger, making you temporarily invulnerable. "Evaded!" will appear over your character when you successfully dodge an attack.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Earning Crafting Levels I
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Earn 10 crafting levels.

<c=@reminder>Craft items to earn crafting experience for that crafting discipline, allowing you to create more powerful items.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Gathering Crafting Materials
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Gather  material from resource nodes.

<c=@reminder>Resource nodes are clumps of ore, saplings, and plants that can be gathered using gathering tools. Nodes can be found by exploring the world.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Leveling Up II
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Earn experience to level up this character to level 30.

<c=@reminder>Experience can be earned by defeating enemies, contributing to events and renown hearts, completing story chapters, and crafting items.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Rallying
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Rally from a downed state  time.

<c=@reminder>Rallying allows you to recover from a downed state by defeating a foe that grants experience.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Salvaging Items
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Use a salvage kit to salvage  item.

<c=@reminder>Some items you'll find will be salvageable. Use a salvage kit to break them down into crafting materials.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Selecting Crafting Disciplines
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Train in a crafting discipline from a crafting master.

<c=@reminder>Items can be crafted at crafting stations in cities and guild halls once you've been trained by an appropriate master craftsman. Crafting uses the crafting materials you collect from gathering nodes and defeated enemies as you explore the world.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Swapping Weapons
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Use the weapon-swap button to switch your active weapon  time.

<c=@reminder>Weapon swap allows you to change between your equipped weapons to access different skills. This mechanic is unlocked at level 10.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Training Skills
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Spend hero points to train a skill.

<c=@reminder>Skills can be learned in the Training tab of the Hero panel by spending hero points. </c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Using Utility Skills
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Use your utility skills  time.

<c=@reminder>Utility skills are unlocked from the training menu in the Hero panel after reaching level 11 by spending Hero points, and they are equipped to the three utility slots on the right side of the skill bar. </c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Using the Bank
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
Deposit  item in your account bank.

<c=@reminder>The Bank tab of your account vault allows you to store items outside of your inventory and transfer them between characters.</c>

Adventure Guide: Volume Two.name: Viewing Vistas II
Adventure Guide: Volume Two.description:
View / vista in Snowden Drifts, Diessa Plateau, Brisban Wildlands, or Kessex Hills.

<c=@reminder>Vistas are scenic locations that show the world from a new perspective, and they are marked with a red triangle icon on the map.</c>

Rare Collections.name: Storm's Eye Weapon Collector
Rare Collections.description: Unlock all  Storm's Eye weapon skins by crafting them or purchasing them from the trading post and binding them to you. Recipes can be purchased from Faction Provisioners in Skywatch Archipelago after unlocking the Eagle Eye weapon skins.

Rare Collections.name: Teleportation Gizmos Collector
Rare Collections.description:
Collect various teleportation gizmos. 

You can update progress for this achievement by traveling to Lion's Arch and meeting one of these conditions:
• You have the item in your inventory.
• You have put a scroll in a portal tome.
• You have completed a related achievement.

Wintersday Daily.description: Win the tenth round of the Toypocalypse.

Arborstone.name: Fan of the Band

Arborstone.name: Lost Lore

Arborstone.name: Lucky Guess

Arborstone.name: Mech Behavior Analysis

Arborstone.name: Pure Enmity

Arborstone.name: Winn's Favorite Patron

Cantha.name: Turtle Unlock: Getting Stronger

Cantha.name: Turtle Unlock: Starting Small

Cantha.name: Winning Hearts and Minds

Tequatl.name: Above the Waves
Tequatl.description: Successfully jump over the shock wave 10 times.

Tequatl.name: Burning Light
Tequatl.description: Fire the megalaser at full strength.

Tequatl.name: Flawless Defense
Tequatl.description: Fight Tequatl without allowing any of the hylek turrets to be destroyed.

Tequatl.name: Have a Seat and Pull the Trigger
Tequatl.description: Use a hylek turret at the Tequatl battle site.

Tequatl.name: I Found It!
Tequatl.description: Find the sunken treasure within the Watery Grave.

Tequatl.name: Power Play
Tequatl.description: Defend the eastern, northern, and western Vigil batteries, and kill Tequatl during a single encounter.

Tequatl.name: Quick on Your Feet
Tequatl.description: Defeat Tequatl without getting hit by a vortex attack.

Tequatl.name: Watch Your Step!
Tequatl.description: Don't get caught in any bloated creeper explosions.

The Shatterer.name: Branded Bane
The Shatterer.description: Kill  Branded during the Shatterer battle.

The Shatterer.name: Burns Blunder
The Shatterer.description: Stand in the wrong place when the Shatterer Lands.

The Shatterer.name: Crystal Clear
The Shatterer.description: Break  people out of crystal prisons created by the Shatterer.

The Shatterer.name: Crystal Healing Denier
The Shatterer.description: Destroy  pulsating crystal node during the Shatterer battle.

The Shatterer.name: Lightning Reflexes
The Shatterer.description: Dodge the Shatterer's Focused Lightning Attack  time while gliding.

The Shatterer.name: Medic!
The Shatterer.description: Provide med kits to your allies using the mortars or the glider bomber kit.

The Shatterer.name: No-Fly Zone
The Shatterer.description: Break the Shatterer's defiance bar  time, preventing its Shard Storm attack.

The Shatterer.name: Shattering Evasion
The Shatterer.description: Defeat the Shatterer without ever being imprisoned in a crystal.

The Shatterer.name: Shattering Setup
The Shatterer.description: Use the mortar, turret, and jump pad at Lowland Burns during the Shatterer fight.

The Shatterer.name: Smash the Dragon
The Shatterer.description: Complete the fight without the Shatterer ever taking off and using Shard Storm.

The Silverwastes.name: Ambassador's Aid
The Silverwastes.description: Assist Ambassador Ikkhit'ch by defending the skritt territory from bandit raiders.

The Silverwastes.name: Arboreal Protector
The Silverwastes.description: Defend the arboreal siege carrier during the assault on the Mordrem Vinewrath.

The Silverwastes.name: Beekeeper Crusher
The Silverwastes.description: Defeat the Mordrem Vinewrath's champion, the Mordrem Beekeeper.

The Silverwastes.name: Copper
The Silverwastes.description: Defeat Champion Mordrem Husk Copper. Active during The Breach after Pact Assault Preparations has been fully completed.

The Silverwastes.name: Covered in Bees!
The Silverwastes.description: Use a honeycomb to avoid taking damage from the Mordrem Vinewrath's beam while fighting the Mordrem Beekeeper.

The Silverwastes.name: Dark Wing Defoliator
The Silverwastes.description: Defeat the Mordrem Vinewrath's champion, the Mordrem Dark Wing.

The Silverwastes.name: Defender: Amber Sandfall
The Silverwastes.description: Successfully defend Amber Sandfall from the Mordrem after the Pact forces holding the fort have achieved level 3 defenses.

The Silverwastes.name: Defender: Blue Oasis
The Silverwastes.description: Successfully defend Blue Oasis from the Mordrem after the Pact forces holding the fort have achieved level 3 defenses.

The Silverwastes.name: Defender: Indigo Cave
The Silverwastes.description: Successfully defend Indigo Cave from the Mordrem after the Pact forces holding the fort have achieved level 3 defenses.

The Silverwastes.name: Defender: Red Rock Bastion
The Silverwastes.description: Successfully defend Red Rock Bastion from the Mordrem after the Pact forces holding the fort have achieved level 3 defenses.

The Silverwastes.name: Devourer Protector
The Silverwastes.description: Defend the devourer siege carrier during the assault on the Mordrem Vinewrath.

The Silverwastes.name: Dive Master: Drydock Scratch
The Silverwastes.description: Find and use a diving location in Drydock Scratch.

The Silverwastes.name: Don't Look Now
The Silverwastes.description: Stand in the correct location to avoid being mesmerized by the Mordrem Vinewrath while fighting the Mordrem Mangler.

The Silverwastes.name: Fear No Evil
The Silverwastes.description: Collect key fragments from lesser nightmare pods, and unlock the greater nightmare pod while the Hidden Depths is dark.

The Silverwastes.name: Go for the Gold
The Silverwastes.description: Find all the golden lost badges hidden throughout the Silverwastes.

The Silverwastes.name: Golem Protector
The Silverwastes.description: Defend the golem siege carrier during the assault on the Mordrem Vinewrath.

The Silverwastes.name: Iron
The Silverwastes.description: Defeat Champion Mordrem Troll Iron. Active during The Breach after Pact Assault Preparations has been fully completed.

The Silverwastes.name: Jump Up to Get Down
The Silverwastes.description: Use plant debris to avoid taking damage from the Mordrem Vinewrath's uproot attack while fighting the Mordrem Dark Wing.

The Silverwastes.name: Lost Badges
The Silverwastes.description: Find all of the lost badges hidden throughout the Silverwastes.

The Silverwastes.name: Mangler Wrangler
The Silverwastes.description: Defeat the Mordrem Vinewrath's champion, the Mordrem Mangler.

The Silverwastes.name: Mercantile Mercenary
The Silverwastes.description: Donate bandit crests to the mercenary requisitioner at Camp Resolve in the Silverwastes.

The Silverwastes.name: Platinum
The Silverwastes.description: Defeat Champion Mordrem Thrasher Platinum. Active during The Breach after Pact Assault Preparations has been fully completed.

The Silverwastes.name: Retrospective Runaround
The Silverwastes.description: Complete the jumping puzzle.

The Silverwastes.name: Silver and Gold
The Silverwastes.description: Defeat Champion Mordrem Teragriff Silver and Champion Mordrem Teragriff Gold. Active during The Breach after Pact Assault Preparations has been fully completed.

The Silverwastes.name: Silverwastes Shoveler
The Silverwastes.description: Use a Silverwastes shovel to uncover a lost bandit chest in the Silverwastes.

The Silverwastes.name: The Annihilator
The Silverwastes.description: Slay the Legendary Mordrem Annihilator. Appears rarely around Red Rock Bastion when controlled by the Pact.

The Silverwastes.name: The Be-All and the End-All
The Silverwastes.description: Slay the Legendary Mordrem Tormentor, Legendary Mordrem Executioner, Legendary Mordrem Demolisher, and Legendary Mordrem Annihilator.

The Silverwastes.name: The Demolisher
The Silverwastes.description: Slay the Legendary Mordrem Demolisher. Appears rarely around Indigo Cave when controlled by the Pact.

The Silverwastes.name: The Executioner
The Silverwastes.description: Slay the Legendary Mordrem Executioner. Appears rarely around Amber Sandfall when controlled by Pact.

The Silverwastes.name: The Tormentor
The Silverwastes.description: Slay the Legendary Mordrem Tormentor. Appears rarely around Blue Oasis when controlled by the Pact.

The Silverwastes.name: Vinewrath Vanquisher
The Silverwastes.description: Defeat the Mordrem Vinewrath.

Triple Trouble.name: Phytotoxin Enthusiast
Triple Trouble.description: Expose yourself to phytotoxins while escorting the Vigil crusader.

Triple Trouble.name: Triple Trouble
Triple Trouble.description: Complete  great jungle wurm achievement in Bloodtide Coast.

Triple Trouble.name: Wurm Bait
Triple Trouble.description: Slather yourself in wurm attractant while escorting the Vigil crusader.

Triple Trouble.name: Wurm Barf
Triple Trouble.description: Get regurgitated by the amber great jungle wurm.

Triple Trouble.name: Wurm Decapitator
Triple Trouble.description: Decapitate  head of the great jungle wurm in Bloodtide Coast.

Triple Trouble.name: Wurm Demolitionist

Triple Trouble.name: Wurm Egg Scrambler

Triple Trouble.name: Wurm Hurdler

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Above and Beyond
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Help the Lionguard take the Aetherblade base by completing all optional events in one run.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Broken Clockwork
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Defeat the Clockwork Nightmare during the Twilight Assault.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Cleaned Your Clockheart
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Destroy the Aetherblade hideout power source.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Fire and Oil
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Put Sparki and Slick in their place.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Greasing the Gears
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Use the ooze to open the gate.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Grounded
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Don't get hit by the electric floors in the security room.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Hack Attack
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Disrupt the security panel in order to progress deeper into the Twilight Assault dungeon.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Prevent the Aetherblade officer from escaping the Twilight Assault dungeon.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Lionguard Justice

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Not in Charge Anymore

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Pirate Booty

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Secrets in the Forest
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Speak with Caithe at the Twilight Assault dungeon.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Stay Cool
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Complete the Ooze Font puzzle without getting hit by flames.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: True Friend to Turma
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Prevent Turma from falling below 75% health.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Twilight Assaulter
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Complete achievements along the Twilight Assault dungeon path.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Unshippable
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Sabotage the Aetherblade ships during the Twilight Assault.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: What Does She Know?
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Quickly gain access to Scarlet's secret room.

Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.name: Who's in Charge Here?
Twilight Arbor Aetherpath.description: Kill Foreman Spur first—without disengaging or dying—and then finish off his entire crew.

New Year's Customs.description: Complete the New Year's Fortune achievement five times over the course of the Lunar New Year festival. The New Year's Fortune achievement is located in the Daily tab.

New Year's Customs.name: Continual Celestial Challenger

New Year's Customs.name: Firework Festival
New Year's Customs.description: Set off  Lunar New Year fireworks.

New Year's Customs.name: New Year's Benevolence

New Year's Customs.name: New Year, New Quaggan
New Year's Customs.description: Donate essences of luck to change Drooburt's yearly bad fortune.

Player vs. Player Rush.name: Daily PvP Rush Contender

Player vs. Player Rush.name: PvP Rush Fighter

The Desolation.name: A Family's Sacrifice
The Desolation.description: Tell Tiba about her father's death, and locate her sister.

The Desolation.name: A Redeemer's Friend
The Desolation.description: After completing successful patrols with Redeemer Kossan, speak with him again once he's talked to Keeper Pamir.

The Desolation.name: A Soaring Stench
The Desolation.description: Soar through Caustic Spur to reach the overlook cache.

The Desolation.name: Acrid Springs Recovery
The Desolation.description: Recover sulfur-worn coins from the ruins of Acrid Springs.

The Desolation.name: Bone Palace Pinnacle
The Desolation.description: Climb to the top of the Bone Palace.

The Desolation.name: Cleansing Tormented Remnants
The Desolation.description: Use your jackal to clear tormented remnants from the Poisoned Outcrops and Helcoid Seeps.

The Desolation.name: Desolation Griffon Expert: Gold
The Desolation.description: Fly your griffon through the rings as quickly as you can!

The Desolation.name: Desolation Griffon Expert: Silver
The Desolation.description: Fly your griffon through the rings as quickly as you can!

The Desolation.name: Desolation Griffon Master: Gold
The Desolation.description: Fly your griffon through the rings as quickly as you can!

The Desolation.name: Desolation Griffon Master: Silver
The Desolation.description: Fly your griffon through the rings as quickly as you can!

The Desolation.name: Full Rebel Assault
The Desolation.description: Save all four captive villagers from execution at Bonestrand Garrison, and ensure they survive to face their enemy.

The Desolation.name: Honoring the Fallen
The Desolation.description: Bow at Sandstrewn Shrine to summon First Spear Dehvad, and collect medals from him for completing his tasks.

The Desolation.name: Jackal Reconnaissance
The Desolation.description: Now that you have your jackal, you can gain tasty treats for it as a reward for helping locals.

The Desolation.name: Joko's Hidden Chamber
The Desolation.description: Gain entry to Joko's hidden chamber.

The Desolation.name: Junundu Whisperer
The Desolation.description: Keep the six junundu alive while destroying all of the siege engines in the Shattered Ravines.

The Desolation.name: Lost Lore of the Desolation
The Desolation.description: Find dispatch pages to complete the Order of Whispers' dispatch collection.

The Desolation.name: Path of the Gods
The Desolation.description: Kneel at the statues of each human god.

The Desolation.name: Race to the Finish: the Desolation
The Desolation.description: Finish the race around Sand Jackal Run in first, second, or third place.

The Desolation.name: Realm-Portal Spiker
The Desolation.description: Plant 100 portal spikes into the realm portals at the Ruptured Heart.

The Desolation.name: Renowned Adventurer: The Desolation
The Desolation.description: Complete all of the renown hearts located in the Desolation.

The Desolation.name: Shadow Patroller
The Desolation.description: Help Redeemer Kossan search for Forged activity by successfully patrolling the Ruination.

The Desolation.name: Shadow Sprinter
The Desolation.description: Earn Order of Shadows seals by successfully completing events and lending assistance to agents throughout the Ruptured Heart and the Desolation.

The Desolation.name: Shadow of a Shadow
The Desolation.description: Complete all six Order of Shadows achievements.

The Desolation.name: Shadows Intel: Gold
The Desolation.description: Gather documents for Order of Shadows agents before time runs out!

The Desolation.name: Shadows Intel: Silver
The Desolation.description: Gather documents for Order of Shadows agents before time runs out!

The Desolation.name: Shadows Provisions
The Desolation.description: Discover Shadows provisions spread throughout the Desolation.

The Desolation.name: Sulfur Shooter
The Desolation.description: Test Creator Jadi's experimental sulfur shooter by using it on, and then killing, a variety of sulfur-damaged Forged.

The Desolation.name: The Desolation Bounty Tour
The Desolation.description: Complete a bounty from each bounty board location.

The Desolation.name: The Desolation Champion Bounties
The Desolation.description: Defeat each Champion bounty in the Desolation at least once.

The Desolation.name: The Desolation Legendary Bounties
The Desolation.description: Defeat each legendary bounty in the Desolation at least once.

The Desolation.name: The Throne of Bones
The Desolation.description: Sit on Palawa Joko's throne.

Battle of Champion's Dusk.name: Army for the Slaughter
Battle of Champion's Dusk.description: Defeat  archer or door breaker during Battle of Champion's Dusk rated matches.

Battle of Kyhlo.name: Hero of Kyhlo

Battle of Kyhlo.description: Neutralize  enemy capture point during Battle of Kyhlo rated matches.

Battle of Kyhlo.name: Kyhlo Defender

Belcher's Bluff.name: Flaunt It
Belcher's Bluff.description: Use all six Signature Moves against your opponents.

Belcher's Bluff.name: Frequent Belcher
Belcher's Bluff.description: Play Belcher's Bluff against other players.

Belcher's Bluff.name: One Drink Left
Belcher's Bluff.description: Defeat your opponent while being one drink away from losing.

Belcher's Bluff.name: You've Got the Moves
Belcher's Bluff.description: Obtain Signature Moves by defeating all six Masters of Om.

Djinn's Dominion.name: Favored by the Djinn

Amnytas.description: Ride a skyscale from the southeast courtyard at the Bastion of the Natural to the southern courtyard at the Bastion of Strength.

Amnytas.name: Cultivate Celestial
Amnytas.description: Successfully complete events in the Bastion of the Celestial.

Amnytas.name: Echoes of the Obscure
Amnytas.description: Learn more about the Bastion of the Obscure and a legendary hero to acquire a powerful and ancient weapon.

Amnytas.name: Fantastic Flying Foxes
Amnytas.description: Play with all shrine guardian infants in Amnytas at least once.

Amnytas.name: For a Rainy Day
Amnytas.description: Find all the hidden Wizard Caches throughout Amnytas.

Amnytas.name: Honorary Astral Ward
Amnytas.description: Prove your dedication to the Astral Ward.

Amnytas.name: Illuminating Amnytas
Amnytas.description: Transfer power to  lanterns at points of interest in Amnytas. These lanterns will only appear after 100% map exploration.

Amnytas.name: Jotun Skypiercer
Amnytas.description: Learn more about the Bastion of the Celestial and the jotun to acquire a powerful and ancient weapon.

Amnytas.name: Knowledge of the Elders
Amnytas.description: Learn more about the Bastion of Knowledge and the Seer to acquire a powerful and ancient weapon.

Amnytas.name: Laugh Like Lyhr Is Watching
Amnytas.description: Laugh when Lyhr asks you to join in with him.

Amnytas.name: Never-Ending Nurture Knowledge
Amnytas.description: Successfully complete events in the Bastion of Knowledge.

Amnytas.name: No Rest for the Kryptis
Amnytas.description: Kill  Kryptis in Amnytas.

Amnytas.name: Nonstop Nourish Natural
Amnytas.description: Successfully complete events in the Bastion of the Natural.

Amnytas.name: Nourish Natural
Amnytas.description: Successfully complete events in the Bastion of the Natural.

Amnytas.name: Nurture Knowledge
Amnytas.description: Successfully complete events in the Bastion of Knowledge.

Amnytas.name: Oblige Obscure
Amnytas.description: Successfully complete events in the Bastion of the Obscure.

Amnytas.name: Omnipresent Oblige Obscure
Amnytas.description: Successfully complete events in the Bastion of the Obscure.

Amnytas.name: Rank Doesn't Matter Here
Amnytas.description: Defeat the champion bosses in the Bastions of Balance, the Natural, and the Celestial.

Amnytas.name: Scales of Dragrimmar
Amnytas.description: Learn more about the Bastion of Balance and the dwarves to acquire a powerful and ancient weapon.

Amnytas.name: Sempiternal Solidifying Strength
Amnytas.description: Successfully complete events in the Bastion of Strength.

Amnytas.name: Skyscale Target Practice in Amnytas: Gold
Amnytas.description: Earn a gold medal in the Skyscale Target Practice in Amnytas adventure.

Amnytas.name: Skyscale Target Practice in Amnytas: Master
Amnytas.description: Finish the Skyscale Target Practice in Amnytas adventure with all targets destroyed.

Amnytas.name: Skyscale Target Practice in Amnytas: Silver
Amnytas.description: Earn a silver medal or better in the Skyscale Target Practice in Amnytas adventure.

Amnytas.name: Solidifying Strength
Amnytas.description: Successfully complete events in the Bastion of Strength.

Amnytas.name: Spire of the Forgotten
Amnytas.description: Learn more about the Bastion of the Natural and the Forgotten to acquire a powerful and ancient weapon.

Amnytas.name: Stay Hydrated
Amnytas.description: Water 10 of Narcisse's plants after removing the Kryptis possessing them.

Amnytas.name: Strength of the Unseen
Amnytas.description: Learn more about Mabon's past and his impact on the Astral Ward.

Amnytas.name: Tentacle Toppler
Amnytas.description: Successfully participate in Tentacle Rift Closing events.

Amnytas.name: The Healing of Amnytas
Amnytas.description: Kill  Kryptis in Amnytas.

Amnytas.name: The Waylit Lantern
Amnytas.description: Help Lyhr reclaim a lost relic.

Amnytas.name: Wrong Time, Wrong Place
Amnytas.description: Get caught in Nourys' bite.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: (Weekly) Challenge Mode Convergences: Outer Nayos
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Successfully complete  unique Weekly Convergence: Outer Nayos with challenge mode active.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: (Weekly) Convergences
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Successfully complete  weekly Convergence.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Avatar of Spite Annihilator
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Defeat  Avatars of Spite.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Continuous Convergence Conqueror
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Successfully complete Convergences.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Challenge Mode: Master
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Earn gold rank in Convergences with challenge mode active for all legendary creatures.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Challenge Mode—Demon Knight: Gold
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Earn gold-rank timing in a Convergence with challenge mode active for this legendary creature.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Challenge Mode—Demon Knight: Silver
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Earn silver-rank timing or better in a Convergence with challenge mode active for this legendary creature.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Challenge Mode—Dreadwing: Gold
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Earn gold-rank timing in a Convergence with challenge mode active for this legendary creature.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Challenge Mode—Dreadwing: Silver
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Earn silver-rank timing or better in a Convergence with challenge mode active for this legendary creature.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Challenge Mode—Hell Sister: Gold
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Earn gold-rank timing in a Convergence with challenge mode active for this legendary creature.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Challenge Mode—Hell Sister: Silver
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Earn silver-rank timing or better in a Convergence with challenge mode active for this legendary creature.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Challenge Mode—Sorrow: Gold
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Earn gold-rank timing in a Convergence with challenge mode active for this legendary creature.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Challenge Mode—Sorrow: Silver
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Earn silver-rank timing or better in a Convergence with challenge mode active for this legendary creature.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Challenge Mode—Umbriel: Gold
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Earn gold-rank timing in a Convergence with challenge mode active for this legendary creature.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Challenge Mode—Umbriel: Silver
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Earn silver-rank timing or better in a Convergence with challenge mode active for this legendary creature.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Conqueror
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Successfully complete Convergences.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Convergence Creature Crusher
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Defeat  enemies in Convergences. Veteran, elite, champion, and legendary enemies give more progress.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Emotional Baggage
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description:
Collect  Kryptis essences in Convergences. 
(Gain less progress when collecting essence as a wisp with the Wisp Pockets Mastery.)

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Kryptis Turret Killer
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Destroy  Kryptis turrets.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Siege Engine Stomper
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Destroy  siege engines.

Convergences: Outer Nayos.name: Wizarding Essentials
Convergences: Outer Nayos.description: Deliver  Kryptis essences to Zojja.

Horn of Maguuma.name: A New Friend
Horn of Maguuma.description: Raise a skyscale by completing skyscale collections for Skyscale Trainer Dyanne.

Horn of Maguuma.name: A New Look
Horn of Maguuma.description: Help Skyscale Trainer Dyanne investigate what's happening to your skyscale mount.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Arcane Osmogrifier
Horn of Maguuma.description: Collect  fragments of the arcane osmogrifier from arcane chests. Greater arcane chests will contain more fragments.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Artisan of Arms: Elementalist's Pistol
Horn of Maguuma.description: Defeat enemies with a pistol as an elementalist.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Artisan of Arms: Engineer's Short Bow
Horn of Maguuma.description: Defeat enemies with a short bow as an engineer.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Artisan of Arms: Guardian's Pistol
Horn of Maguuma.description: Defeat enemies with a pistol as a guardian.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Artisan of Arms: Mesmer's Rifle
Horn of Maguuma.description: Defeat enemies with a rifle as a mesmer.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Artisan of Arms: Necromancer's Sword
Horn of Maguuma.description: Defeat enemies with a sword as a necromancer.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Artisan of Arms: Ranger's Mace
Horn of Maguuma.description: Defeat enemies with a mace as a ranger.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Artisan of Arms: Revenant's Scepter
Horn of Maguuma.description: Defeat enemies with a scepter as a revenant.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Artisan of Arms: Thief's Axe
Horn of Maguuma.description: Defeat enemies with an axe as a thief.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Artisan of Arms: Warrior's Staff
Horn of Maguuma.description: Defeat enemies with a staff as a warrior.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Astral Ward Armor
Horn of Maguuma.description: Purchase the Astral Ward Armor set from the Wizard's Tower Outfitter.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Forgotten Lore
Horn of Maguuma.description: Collect Fragments of Forgotten Lore from Various Locations in Orr

Horn of Maguuma.name: I Got a Golden Ticket
Horn of Maguuma.description: Purchase a golden ticket in the Wizard's Tower.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Kryptis Generals
Horn of Maguuma.description: Kill champion-level Kryptis avatars.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Master of Masteries: Secrets of the Obscure
Horn of Maguuma.description: Complete  Mastery achievements in Secrets of the Obscure.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Oneiros-Spun Armor
Horn of Maguuma.description:
Purchase the Oneiros-Spun Armor set from the Wizard's Tower Outfitter.
Unlocking one skin's weight unlocks the other weights' skins.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Rift Hunter Armor
Horn of Maguuma.description: Earn the Rift Hunter Armor set by by completing the Secrets of the Obscure story journal.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Skyfarer
Horn of Maguuma.description: Explore all areas in Secrets of the Obscure.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Skyscale Egg Infusions
Horn of Maguuma.description: Infuse your skyscale egg with all the necessary magics, then bring it to Skyscale Trainer Dyanne.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Skyscale Growing Comforts
Horn of Maguuma.description: Collect all the food, treats, and toys to raise a skyscale, and bring them to Skyscale Trainer Dyanne.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Skyscale Medicine Masker
Horn of Maguuma.description: Collect  pieces of meat from hunting jungle wurms. World boss and champion wurms will give significantly more meat.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Skyscale Saddle Materials
Horn of Maguuma.description: Collect all the materials for a skyscale saddle and bring them to Skyscale Trainer Dyanne.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Wayfinder Guided Home
Horn of Maguuma.description: Find and activate Aziure's portal.

Horn of Maguuma.name: Weaponmaster Training
Horn of Maguuma.description:
Speak with Frode during or after Secrets of the Obscure chapter 3, Mother of Stars.

Players can also unlock this achievement by purchasing the Weaponmaster Training Document in WvW from the Heroics Notary vendor.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: (Repeatable) Event Collection: Citadel of Zakiros
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Complete each of the  unique events in the Citadel of Zakiros.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: A Rift in Our Relationship
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Defeat  Kryptis attacking through rifts while fighting Charybda or Eparch.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: All the Feelings
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Gather  unique emotional attunements at least once.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Amnytas Is Still Ours, Demons!
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Successfully complete unique Kryptis events in Amnytas.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Barely a Scratch
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Ensure Arina's health does not drop below 80% as she descends the Spire of Creation and sieges the hatchery.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Big Mood
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Gather  emotional attunements while fighting Karax or Eparch in the Citadel of Zakiros.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Event Collection: Citadel of Zakiros
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Complete event collection achievements around the Citadel of Zakiros.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Event Collection: Spire of Creation
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Participate in  successful events in the Spire of Creation.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Event Collection: Spire of Redemption
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Participate in  successful events in the Spire of Redemption.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Event Collection: The Midnight Abyss
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Participate in successful events in the Midnight Abyss.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Extractor Eyesore
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Use caustic grenades to damage defiance bars in the "Disable Zakiros's extractor towers" event.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: First Journey into the Spider's Lair
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Successfully defeat Eparch during the Into the Spider's Lair meta-event.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Free Kryptis Essence: Gold
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Earn a gold medal in the Free Kryptis Essence adventure.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Free Kryptis Essence: Master
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Finish the Free Kryptis Essence adventure with 22 or more essence freed.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Free Kryptis Essence: Silver
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Earn a silver medal or better in the Free Kryptis Essence adventure.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Inner Nayos Mastery III
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description:
Complete achievements throughout Inner Nayos, or take a break to enjoy a few adventures.

(Note: The Mastery point is a reward for partial completion of this achievement.)

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Inner Nayos Skirmish Squasher
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Successfully complete skirmish events around Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Jailbreak
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Earn  progress points by defeating caretakers and breaking locks in the "Siege the Chamber of Rehabilitation and free the prisoners" event.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Kryptis Caretaker
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: During the "Descend the Spire of Redemption" event, prevent Peitha's health from dropping below 80%.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Missing Brood
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Find Kosmas's missing broodlings hiding around the Horn of Maguuma.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Nayos Recon Run: Gold
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description:
Earn a gold medal in the Nayos Recon Run adventure. 

(This achievement can be completed in the race event or adventure. Progress will update when you claim the rewards.)

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Nayos Recon Run: Silver
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description:
Earn a silver medal or better in the Nayos Recon Run adventure.

(This achievement can be completed in the race event or adventure. Progress will update when you claim the rewards.)

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: No One Needs Another Nourys
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Siege the hatchery and destroy the strange relics. Dispatching adolescent abyssal watchers awards more progress.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Reuniting Lost Kryptis: Gold
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description:
Earn a gold medal in the Reuniting Lost Kryptis adventure.

(Progress will update when you claim the rewards from this adventure.)

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Reuniting Lost Kryptis: Silver
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description:
Earn a silver medal or better in the Reuniting Lost Kryptis adventure.

(Progress will update when you claim the rewards from this adventure.)

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Skyscale Target Practice in Inner Nayos: Gold
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Earn a gold medal in the Skyscale Target Practice in Inner Nayos adventure.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Skyscale Target Practice in Inner Nayos: Master
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Finish the Skyscale Target Practice in Inner Nayos adventure with all targets destroyed.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Skyscale Target Practice in Inner Nayos: Silver
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Earn a silver medal or better in the Skyscale Target Practice in Inner Nayos adventure.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Spellbombs Away
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Use astral spellbombs to damage pylons  times during the "Clear the malignant fog protecting Zakiros" event.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Squad Interceptor
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Intercept recon and patrol squads and defeat their lieutenants around Amnytas and Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Threatened Consumer
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Use the /threaten emote during the "Defeat Eparch, the Consumed King" event.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Vialgos Vomit
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description:
Avoid being hit too many times by Vialgos's malignant toxin.

(Eligibility for achievement starts when you dismount on the platform. It is removed if you are hit too many times or leave the platform.)

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: What Was Before
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Search Inner Nayos for the relics that hint at the past.

Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.name: Who's a Good Kryptis?
Inner Nayos: Citadel of Zakiros.description: Pet the very best Kryptis mount at the recon adventure in Heitor's Territory.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Behind Demon Lines
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Successfully complete unique events in Heitor's territory in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Dead Air
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: While mounted on your skyscale, destroy Kryptis turrets throughout Heitor's territory in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Follow the Leader
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Aid the Astral Ward in clearing out Kryptis patrol leaders and the lieutenant in Heitor's Dominion in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Follow the Magic
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Collect magic to help prevent the extractors from draining the life from Heitor's Dominion in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Frode's Journal
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Find Frode's journal pages around the Horn of Maguuma.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Heitor Instigator
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Use the /beckon emote in front of Heitor's Gate.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: If It Ain't Broke
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Defeat the Kryptis attacking the newly rebuilt turrets in Heitor's Dominion in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Ignaxious Eradicator
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Complete each of the 5 events in the Road to Heitor meta-event and defeat Ignaxious.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Inner Nayos Mastery I
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Complete achievements throughout Heitor's territory in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Looking Down from the Edge
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Jump off the high branches into the water near the northern beacon.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Loyalist Harrier
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Successfully complete unique events in Heitor's territory in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: No Chest Unopened
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Discover and open all the shrine guardian chests in Heitor's territory in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Power Nap
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Use the /sleep emote inside a tent at the Astral Ward camp.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Rebuild and Destroy
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Help the Astral Ward gather parts to rebuild turrets in Heitor's Dominion in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Rift Bouncer
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Complete rift events in Inner Nayos without allowing any invaders through the rift.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Snoren on the Job
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Help retrieve the supplies stolen from Snoren and Norrag.

Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.name: Threat of Our Presence
Inner Nayos: Heitor's Territory.description: Complete each of the 5 events in the Road to Heitor meta-event and defeat Ignaxious.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: (Repeatable) Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds Savior
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Successfully complete events in Nyedra Surrounds in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: A Gust of Clean Air
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Help Scipio get rid of the hazardous nests above the forward bivouac.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: A Record of War
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Complete each of the bastion achievements and learn about the Kryptis and Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: A Record of War: Balance
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Complete various tasks throughout Nayos and earn the banner of the Bastion of Balance.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: A Record of War: Knowledge
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Complete various tasks throughout Nayos and earn the banner of the Bastion of Knowledge.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: A Record of War: Strength
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Complete various tasks throughout Nayos and earn the banner of the Bastion of Strength.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: A Record of War: The Celestial
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Complete various tasks throughout Nayos and earn the banner of the Bastion of the Celestial.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: A Record of War: The Natural
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Complete various tasks throughout Nayos and earn the banner of the Bastion of the Natural.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: A Record of War: The Obscure
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Complete various tasks throughout Nayos and earn the banner of the Bastion of the Obscure.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: An Object in Motion
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: On a flying mount, spend 30 continuous seconds being carried by the ley-line loop above the high rocks in Nyedra Surrounds.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Astral Express
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Deliver  resources to Vethrax.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Astral Miner
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Gather 50 ore in Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Bane of the Scorned
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Help Major Emund and Reya defeat Abraxces the Scorned.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Better Consumer Than Consumed
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Deliver nourishment to  hungry Kryptis.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Defang the Fangs That Gnash
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Defeat Knaebelag the Terror.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Diving Goggles: Rock Top to Rock Bottom
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Jump off a high rock into the water near the Fortress of the Founding.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Emotional Barrier
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Use an emote to power the barrier generator during the "Wreak havoc in the Fortress of the Founding" event.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Envious Reprieve
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Defeat the students of Charybda.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Follow the Magic II
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description:
Collect magic from the extractors in the Defiled Cradle.
Gain more progress if Follow the Magic is completed.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Illuminating Inner Nayos
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Transfer power to  lanterns at points of interest in Heitor's Territory and Nyedra Surrounds.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Inner Nayos Mastery II
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Complete achievements throughout Nyedra Surrounds in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Inner Nayos: Defiled Cradle Savior
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Successfully complete unique events in Defiled Cradle in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds Savior
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Complete event-completion achievements throughout Nyedra Surrounds in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Inner Nayos: Nyedra, Dreamer's Sanctum Savior
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Successfully complete unique events in Nyedra, Dreamer's Sanctum in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Inner Nayos: Stormcarved Hollows Savior
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Successfully complete unique events in Stormcarved Hollows in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Inner Nayos: The Commons Savior
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Successfully complete unique events in the Commons in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Inner Nayos: The Old Settlement Savior
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Successfully complete unique events in the Old Settlement in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Itching for a Fight

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Kryptis Champion Conqueror
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Defeat  champion Kryptis.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Kryptis Veteran Vanquisher
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Defeat  veteran Kryptis.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Liberators and Subjugators
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Free  captured Kryptis.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Not Like This Again

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Obstructor of Malice

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Please Take a Seat
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Use the /sit emote at the edge of the western elevated cliffs in the Coliseum of the Midnight King.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Quality Family Entertainment
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Use the /cheer emote from the coliseum seats while Knaebelag the Terror is present.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Repeat Defanger
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Complete each of the 6 events in the Fangs That Gnash meta-event and defeat Knaebelag.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Shrine Finder
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Discover and open all the shrine guardian chests in Nyedra Surrounds in Inner Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Sky Scorcher
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Defeat 25 Kryptis in Nayos while using your skyscale.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Skyscale Energizer
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Collect 50 essences using your skyscale throughout Nayos.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Tentacle Takedown
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Defeat tentacles of Nourys during events while protecting Koris and Eppie.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: The Fangs That Gnash
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Successfully complete each of the events in the Fangs That Gnash event chain.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: These Supplies Are Ours, Eparch. Ours!
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Ensure no supplies are stolen during the "Stop loyalists from stealing supplies" event.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Told You So
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Miss the jump off a high rock into the water near the Fortress of the Founding.

Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.name: Turret Takedown
Inner Nayos: Nyedra Surrounds.description: Destroy Kryptis turrets and help the fleeing Kryptis make it to the forward bivouac.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: ...Back Again
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Ride a skyscale or griffon from the southern gate of the Wizard's Tower to the blue orb near the Beacon of Ages Waypoint at Wizard's Ascent in under 10 minutes without dismounting or teleporting.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Crate Keeper
Skywatch Archipelago.description: At Jade Mech Habitation Zone 03: Protect all three crates from being destroyed by the naga during a single event.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Diving Goggles: Astral Dive
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Use the diving goggles to jump off the rings at Stargaze Ridge.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Diving Goggles: Free Fall of New Kaineng
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Use the diving goggles to jump off an island overlooking the Jade Mech Habitation Zone 03 dam.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Diving Goggles: Pillar Plunge
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Use the diving goggles to jump off the fallen pillar in Primal Maguuma.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Don't Think Twice
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Use /ponder by the large orb at Wizard's Ascent.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Guided by Fate
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Use /kneel at Glint's Shrine in Droknar's Light.

Skywatch Archipelago.description: Transfer power to  lanterns at points of interest in Skywatch Archipelago. These lanterns will only appear after 100% map exploration.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Insect Incinerator
Skywatch Archipelago.description:
In Primal Maguuma, help the Ward Technician reduce the insect population using your skyscale.

Using the Fireball Mastery grants more progress.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Island Discovery Tour
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Visit all of the floating fractal islands and learn about each one.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Knowing Is Half the Battle
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Prepare 5 ingredients in a row for Alchemist Briella during a single event.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Let the Memory Live Again
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Use /crossarms in the Ministry of Transit waiting area.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Off to See the Wizard's Tower
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Successfully complete events during Unlocking the Wizard's Tower meta-event.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Only the Strong Survive
Skywatch Archipelago.description:
At Wizard's Ascent, correctly prepare 45 ingredients for Alchemist Briella.

If you have the Knowing Is Half the Battle achievement, progress is doubled for successful ingredient preparations.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Paper Trail
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Overload the Ministry of Transit Agent with Travel Papers

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Shelter In Place
