Skywatch Archipelago.name: Skyscale Target Practice in Skywatch Archipelago: Gold
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Earn a gold medal or better in the Skyscale Target Practice in Skywatch Archipelago adventure.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Skyscale Target Practice in Skywatch Archipelago: Master
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Finish the Skyscale Target Practice in Skywatch Archipelago adventure with all targets destroyed.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Skyscale Target Practice in Skywatch Archipelago: Silver

Skywatch Archipelago.name: Stargaze Ridge Skyscale Ride
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Ride a skyscale from the top of the dome on Stargaze Ridge to the tower in western Primal Maguuma in under 2 minutes without dismounting or teleporting.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: The Feeling Is Mutual
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Collect essence of emotion during the Unlocking the Wizard's Tower meta-event.

Skywatch Archipelago.name: There and...
Skywatch Archipelago.description: Ride a skyscale from the blue orb near the Beacon of Ages Waypoint at Wizard's Ascent to the southern gate of the Wizard's Tower in under 10 minutes without dismounting or teleporting.

The Wizard's Tower.name: A Promise Kept
The Wizard's Tower.description: Give Basil's letter to Aellin.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Comrades in Arms
The Wizard's Tower.description: Find the missing Astral Ward members.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Consternation with Conri
The Wizard's Tower.description: Use the /upset emote near Conri to let him know how you really feel about his sales tactics.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Flashing into Focus
The Wizard's Tower.description: Activate all the hidden symbols in the Wizard's Tower within the time limit.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Gape into the Abyss
The Wizard's Tower.description:
Open  astral fluctuating masses.

(These can be purchased from Gharr Leadclaw in the Wizard's Tower. Requires Wayfinder Mastery.)

The Wizard's Tower.name: Hide-and-Seek in the Wizard's Tower
The Wizard's Tower.description: Win 20 games of hide-and-seek with the apprentice in the Wizard's Tower.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Hide-and-Seek in the Wizard's Tower: Master
The Wizard's Tower.description: Find the hiding djinn in the Wizard's Tower within 60 seconds.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Keep It Up
The Wizard's Tower.description: Release aetheric energy from the vault and guide it to the Mystic Forge without letting it break and disperse.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Salute the Shopkeeper
The Wizard's Tower.description: Use the /salute emote at Gharr Leadclaw.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Secrets Obscured
The Wizard's Tower.description: Retrieve the scattered wizard relics around Tyria.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Secrets Unobscured
The Wizard's Tower.description: Peer beyond the veil to uncover hidden treasures in the Wizard's Tower.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Sorrow's Lost
The Wizard's Tower.description: Locate each of the Oracle cards.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Thornsprout Boom!
The Wizard's Tower.description: Refuse to heed Gharr's warning about staying out of his cabbages.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Tyrian Taste Testing
The Wizard's Tower.description: Discover ingredients to prepare dishes for Tyria's new demonic diplomats.

The Wizard's Tower.name: Wizard's Tower Diving Goggles
The Wizard's Tower.description: Take a plunge off the high dive in the Wizard's Tower.

Anomalous Occurrences.name: Anomalies of the World
Anomalous Occurrences.description: Disperse Ley-Line Anomalies in all of the areas they appear.

Anomalous Occurrences.name: Anomalous Results
Anomalous Occurrences.description: Successfully disperse  Ley-Line Anomalies before they overload.

Anomalous Occurrences.name: Bloodstone Harvest
Anomalous Occurrences.description: Recover the bloodstone slivers that have affected creatures, and collect the remaining slivers in the world before they can do more harm.

Anomalous Occurrences.name: Bloodstone Sightings
Anomalous Occurrences.description: Find and identify bloodstone-crazed creatures throughout Tyria.

Anomalous Occurrences.name: Dispersed Anomaly
Anomalous Occurrences.description: Disperse a Ley-Line Anomaly before it can absorb any coalescences.

Anomalous Occurrences.name: Fragmented Anomaly
Anomalous Occurrences.description: Disperse a Ley-Line Anomaly without it reabsorbing any fragments.

Anomalous Occurrences.name: Ley Line Researched
Anomalous Occurrences.description: Collect a Ley-Infused Lodestone from Ela Makkay.

Conservation of Magic.name: Conservation of Magic
Conservation of Magic.description: Complete each task to stay on top of the overflow of magic.

Conservation of Magic.name: Fiona's Stockpile
Conservation of Magic.description: In Snowden Drifts, successfully stop the Inquest from capturing  ley-line coalescences after contributing ley energy to the Priory.

Conservation of Magic.name: Flinnz's Retirement
Conservation of Magic.description: In Blazeridge Steppes, successfully stop the Inquest from capturing  ley-line coalescences after contributing ley energy to the Consortium.

Conservation of Magic.name: Garen's Defense
Conservation of Magic.description: In Mount Maelstrom, successfully stop the Inquest from capturing  ley-line coalescences after contributing ley energy to the Priory.

Conservation of Magic.name: Hold the Line
Conservation of Magic.description: Don't allow any accumulated ley-line magic to be absorbed by dragon minions.

Conservation of Magic.name: Keadin's Study
Conservation of Magic.description: In Blazeridge Steppes, successfully stop the Inquest from capturing  ley-line coalescences after contributing ley energy to the Priory.

Conservation of Magic.name: Ley of the Land
Conservation of Magic.description: Speak with Ela Makkay about surging magical energy.

Conservation of Magic.name: Ley-Line "Research"
Conservation of Magic.description: Assist the Consortium in collecting accumulated ley energy.

Conservation of Magic.name: Ley-Line Cartography
Conservation of Magic.description: Prevent dragon minions from absorbing the ley-line magic that has accumulated across Tyria.

Conservation of Magic.name: Ley-Line Research
Conservation of Magic.description: Assist the Priory in collecting accumulated ley energy.

Conservation of Magic.name: Loonaloo's Paycheck
Conservation of Magic.description: In Mount Maelstrom, successfully stop the Inquest from capturing  ley-line coalescences after contributing ley energy to the Consortium.

Conservation of Magic.name: Magic Dispersed
Conservation of Magic.description: Defeat  coalescences to disperse their magic back to the ley-lines.

Conservation of Magic.name: Out of the Wrong Hands
Conservation of Magic.description: Successfully stop the Inquest from capturing  ley-line coalescences.

Conservation of Magic.name: Pursuit of Knowledge
Conservation of Magic.description: Find the unidentified lodestone and return it to Ela Makkay.

Conservation of Magic.name: Shana's Ambition
Conservation of Magic.description: In Snowden Drifts, successfully stop the Inquest from capturing  ley-line coalescences after contributing ley energy to the Consortium.

Conservation of Magic.name: Thwart the Inquest
Conservation of Magic.description: Don't allow the Inquest to collect any accumulated ley-line magic.

Current Events.name: End Conjecture
Current Events.description: After completing the meta-achievement Return to the Dragonstorm, visit Taimi and Gorrik at the Eye of the North.

Current Events.name: Parallel Analysis

Current Events.name: Seasons of the Dragons
Current Events.description: Complete  Return meta-achievements. Return meta-achievements will become available over time, and they are permanently available once introduced.

Current Events.name: Studying Scarlet
Current Events.description: After completing the meta-achievement Return To Silverwastes 2, visit Taimi and Gorrik at the Eye of the North.

End of Dragons: Act 1.description: Release yourself from your cell.

End of Dragons: Act 1.name: Think Before You Leap
End of Dragons: Act 1.description: Clear the Armada using the leap skill less than 10 times.

End of Dragons: Act 1.name: This Isn't Cannon
End of Dragons: Act 1.description: Avoid all cannon fire and spinning traps.

End of Dragons: Act 1.name: Your Kind of People
End of Dragons: Act 1.description: Investigate what's happening in Shing Jea.

End of Dragons: Act 2.name: Duct Cleaning
End of Dragons: Act 2.description: Use the drone's static discharge ability to clear out vermin hiding in the ducts.

End of Dragons: Act 2.name: End of Dragons: Act 2 Mastery
End of Dragons: Act 2.description: Complete all  End of Dragons: Act 2 achievements.

End of Dragons: Act 2.name: Got Her Back
End of Dragons: Act 2.description: Keep Mai from being interrupted by jade guard mechs while she's disabling security.

End of Dragons: Act 2.name: Industrial Espionage
End of Dragons: Act 2.description: Find all of the subversive memos and notes at the Xunlai Jade power plant.

End of Dragons: Act 2.name: It's a Mercy
End of Dragons: Act 2.description: Locate and eliminate all of Ankka's Risen monstrosities.

End of Dragons: Act 2.name: Mai Goodness
End of Dragons: Act 2.description: Find all files, logs, and other clues to learn about Mai Trin's time with Xunlai Jade.

End of Dragons: Act 2.name: Ribbit!
End of Dragons: Act 2.description: Scan the second set of jade power cells without touching the water, with or without the scanner stowed. No gliding!

End of Dragons: Act 2.name: Take That, Bureaucrats!
End of Dragons: Act 2.description: Get creative in your Ministry of Transportation paperwork.

End of Dragons: Act 2.name: The Premium Tour
End of Dragons: Act 2.description: Experience all the sights and sounds of the New Kaineng City docks.

End of Dragons: Act 2.name: The Scenic Route
End of Dragons: Act 2.description: Navigate the perilous waters of bureaucracy.

End of Dragons: Act 2.name: Time Pilot
End of Dragons: Act 2.description: Find and scan all of the jade power cells before time runs out!

End of Dragons: Act 2.name: Tracking Number
End of Dragons: Act 2.description: Don't get hit by any shipping crates thrown by the haywire loading mech.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Better Be Nimble
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Defeat Void Ishan without being damaged by its acid breath attack.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Boarding Party
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Attempted to Board an Aetherblade Ship

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Brotherhood Saboteur
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Sabotage the Jade Brotherhood to acquire intel on Ankka.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Commander Be Quick
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Defeat Void Ishan before the timer runs out.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: De-Escalation Training
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Successfully talk Captain Fa out of arresting you.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Echovald Unmade
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Find  instabilities in Echovald Wilds.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Empty
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Defeat a villain.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: End of Dragons: Act 3 Mastery
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Complete all  End of Dragons: Act 3 achievements.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Evolution within Decay
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Find Ankka's old journal.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Fallout
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Get in trouble with the law and discover Cantha's dark underside.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Jade Shadow
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Complete Kage's special mission parameters inside the Jade Brotherhood camp.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Munitions Officer's Log
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Find Renyak's "Notes"

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Nika's Vengeance
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Defeat Captain Fa while under the influence of the "special" dish.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Quiet Death
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Defeat the chapter boss in the alloted time.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Silenced Voices
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Complete Shisokana's special mission parameters inside the Speakers camp.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Speakers Saboteur
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Sabotage the Speakers to acquire intel on Ankka.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Study of the Macabre
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Find all evidence of incursions while searching Arborstone.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Things Were Different Back Then
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Find a record of Ankka's early days.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: To Catch a Spider
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Set up a base of operations and reconnoiter.

End of Dragons: Act 3.name: Unruffled
End of Dragons: Act 3.description: Defeat the chapter boss without being downed.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: A Woman of Culture
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Find all the readable books in Joon's mansion.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: Almost Clever
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Make a reasonable but unsecure guess as to what Joon's password might be.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: Boat Tour for Two
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Give Rama a nice boat ride across Cantha's waters.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: End of Dragons: Act 4 Mastery
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Complete all  End of Dragons: Act 4 achievements.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: Family Values
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Meet everyone who lives in Joon's mansion.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: Fascist Flattener
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Take out the chapter bosses in the allotted time.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: Guilt by Association
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Find out where the Crystal Bloom went off to.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: In the Name of the Law
Laser Light Footed
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Make it through the defenses without being hit by laser or shock-wave turrets.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: Laser Show-Off
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Make it to the workshop without being hit by laser or shock-wave turrets.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: Objection!
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Present the evidence at the ideal time.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: Resolute
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Defeat the chapter boss without being downed.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: Show Stopper
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Test all of Joon's demo equipment— to death.

End of Dragons: Act 4.name: The System Is Down
End of Dragons: Act 4.description: Take out Joon's final defenses in the alloted time.

End of Dragons: Act 5.name: A Real Hero
End of Dragons: Act 5.description: Stand strong against the waves of Void.

End of Dragons: Act 5.name: Cancel the Apocalypse
End of Dragons: Act 5.description: Complete your final stand in the allotted time.

End of Dragons: Act 5.name: Competent Commander
End of Dragons: Act 5.description: Check in with representatives of all allied forces in Dragon's End while placing extractors.

End of Dragons: Act 5.name: End of Dragons: Act 5 Mastery
End of Dragons: Act 5.description: Complete all  End of Dragons: Act 5 achievements.

End of Dragons: Act 5.name: I Brought Flowers
End of Dragons: Act 5.description: Pick up a bouquet from the flower merchant to bring to Marjory and Kasmeer's gathering.

End of Dragons: Act 5.name: Rapid Ascent
End of Dragons: Act 5.description: Reach the top of the tower in the allotted time.

End of Dragons: Act 5.name: Stayed 'til the End
End of Dragons: Act 5.description: Watch the entire end credits roll.

End of Dragons: Act 5.name: True Ending
End of Dragons: Act 5.description: Participate in "Defeat Soo-Won" in Dragon's End before beginning "The Only One."

End of Dragons: Act 5.name: Unconquered
End of Dragons: Act 5.description: Make your final stand without being downed.

End of Dragons: Act 5.name: Undeterred
End of Dragons: Act 5.description: Reach the final phase without being downed.

End of Dragons: Act 5.name: Until We Meet Again
End of Dragons: Act 5.description: Check in with all your friends and allies in Arborstone.

End of Dragons: Interlude.name: Forward
End of Dragons: Interlude.description: Meet with Aurene at Seitung Harbor.

End of Dragons: Interlude.name: Not Ready for Good-Bye
End of Dragons: Interlude.description: Spend time with Caithe and Aurene.

Entanglement.name: Butterflies and Viscera
Entanglement.description: Defeat the Mordrem thrasher without losing any of Marjory's minions.

Entanglement.name: Dropping like Flies
Entanglement.description: Don't let any allies in Concordia perish in the initial attack.

Entanglement.name: Entanglement
Entanglement.description: Follow Scarlet's trail to uncover what she was after in Dry Top.

Entanglement.name: Fire for Effect
Entanglement.description: Kill five Inquest with one barrage from Scarlet's turrets.

Entanglement.name: Mess with the Bull...
Entanglement.description: Defeat the Inquest at the second console location as a steam minotaur without ejecting.

Entanglement.name: No Tricks
Entanglement.description: Defeat the Inquest in the ley line hub without using any of Scarlet's turrets or steam creatures.

Entanglement.name: On Swift Wings
Entanglement.description: Find and rescue all survivors in the area around Concordia.

Entanglement.name: Sheltered from the Rain
Entanglement.description: Defeat the Mordrem thrasher without getting hit by its rain of spores.

Entanglement.name: Time Waits for No One
Entanglement.description: Complete the Concordia instance in under 10 minutes.

Entanglement.name: Timely Arrival
Entanglement.description: Don't let any members of the stranded Seraph squad die.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Aetherblade Broken
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Complete the Defeat the Elite Aetherblades event.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: All Bets Are Off
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Find all 7 of Tigg's lost racing moas and rally them to escape Lion's Arch.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Antitoxin
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Kill the Champion Toxic Wurm Queen in Lion's Arch.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Breach From the Beach
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Participate in retaking the southern rally point.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Cold Comfort
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Participate in retaking the eastern rally point.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Delaqua Investigator
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Help Marjory and Kasmeer investigate Scarlet's motives.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Extraction Complete
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Complete  achievement from this category.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Fort Marriner Fighter
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Completely retake Fort Marriner and its surrounding areas.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Group Effort I
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Participate in retaking a rally point during the Battle for Lion's Arch.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Group Effort II
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Participate in clearing an occupied sector during the Battle For Lion's Arch.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Group Effort III
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Participate in defeating an enemy champion during the Battle for Lion's Arch.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Group Effort IV
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Participate in reclaiming one of the city's major districts during the Battle for Lion's Arch.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Group Effort V
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Participate in defeating Scarlet's assault knights during the Battle for Lion's Arch.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Live on the Edge
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Enter the Edge of the Mists from anywhere in Tyria.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Melted and Muted
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Defeat the Champion Molten Berserker in Lion's Arch.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Memories in Your Hand
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Find lost personal items in the city rubble during the Escape from Lion's Arch story mission or Battle for Lion's Arch mission.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Please Follow Me to the Exit
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Find and rescue all 6 hidden evacuees.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Postern Ward Protector
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Completely retake Postern Ward and its surrounding areas.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Raiders of the Lost Parts
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Find and retrieve Taimi's golem parts from the Edge of the Mists.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: The Northern Gambit
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Participate in retaking the northern rally point.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Three Fronts
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Capture all 3 rally points and begin retaking Lion's Arch.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Trader's Forum Triumphant
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Completely retake Trader's Forum and its surrounding areas.

Escape from Lion's Arch.name: Triple Play
Escape from Lion's Arch.description: Completely retake all 3 attack areas and begin the final push to retake Lion's Arch.

Flame and Frost.name: A Quiet Celebration
Flame and Frost.description: Complete the story chapter A Quiet Celebration.

Flame and Frost.description: Commemorate the completion of the Flame and Frost story by celebrating with your new allies in Hoelbrak.

Flame and Frost.description: Stabilize Diessa Plateau against the Molten Alliance by completing events and returning audio logs to Agent Brandubh. Molten Alliance events award extra progress.

Flame and Frost.name: Against the Alliance 2
Flame and Frost.description: Stabilize Diessa Plateau against the Molten Alliance by completing events and returning audio logs to Agent Brandubh. Molten Alliance events award extra progress.

Flame and Frost.name: Alliance Breaker
Flame and Frost.description: Complete the following achievements for Flame and Frost: Refugee Volunteer, Lost and Found, the Gathering Storm, Secret Contact, and Avenger of the Dispossessed.

Flame and Frost.name: Alliance Investigation
Flame and Frost.description: Complete the story chapter Alliance Investigation.

Flame and Frost.name: Avenger of the Dispossessed
Flame and Frost.description: Followed Up with Rox and Braham

Flame and Frost.name: Braham - Eirsson
Flame and Frost.description: Witness Braham's meeting with Knut Whitebear.

Flame and Frost.name: Braham - Retake Cragstead
Flame and Frost.description: Help Braham retake Cragstead.

Flame and Frost.name: Braham: Help from the Legions
Flame and Frost.description: Witness Braham's encounter with Rytlock.

Flame and Frost.name: Flame and Frost Mastery
Flame and Frost.description: Complete  Flame and Frost achievements.

Flame and Frost.description: Complete the Molten Boss Fractal after completing the Flame and Frost episode.

Flame and Frost.name: Fractal Recursion: Molten Furnace
Flame and Frost.description: Complete the Molten Furnace Fractal after completing the Flame and Frost episode.

Flame and Frost.name: Guiding Sign
Flame and Frost.description: Help guide refugees in Diessa Plateau by rebuilding signposts along the road to the Black Citadel.

Flame and Frost.name: Hero's Aid
Flame and Frost.description: Successfully complete all of the Rox and Braham Living Story instances.

Flame and Frost.name: Investigative Study 1
Flame and Frost.description: During the Flame and Frost storyline, find and read sources of information on the Molten Alliance.

Flame and Frost.name: Lost and Found
Flame and Frost.description: Return  belongings to refugees.

Flame and Frost.name: Molten Furnace
Flame and Frost.description: Complete the story chapter Molten Furnace.

Flame and Frost.name: Molten Memorial
Flame and Frost.description: Find hidden keepsakes from the fallen in the Molten Furnace and return them to friends and relatives.

Flame and Frost.name: New Friends, New Enemies
Flame and Frost.description: Complete the story chapter New Friends, New Enemies.

Flame and Frost.name: Rage Against the War Machine
Flame and Frost.description: Destroy the Molten Alliance weapons facility in Diessa Plateau.

Flame and Frost.name: Ready Ore Not
Flame and Frost.description: In the Molten Furnace story instance, find all of the hidden mining nodes.

Flame and Frost.name: Refugee Volunteer
Flame and Frost.description: Assist the refugees  times.

Flame and Frost.name: Rox - The Hatchery
Flame and Frost.description: Help Rox defend the hatchery.

Flame and Frost.name: Rox: Critical Mission
Flame and Frost.description: Witness Rox's meeting with Rytlock.

Flame and Frost.name: Secret Contact
Flame and Frost.description: Use the Order Cryptotranslator to decrypt  dead drops.

Flame and Frost.name: The Battle for Cragstead
Flame and Frost.description: Complete the story chapter The Battle for Cragstead.

Flame and Frost.name: The Gathering Storm
Flame and Frost.description: Kill  invaders.

Flashpoint.name: "Flashpoint" Mastery
Flashpoint.description: Complete  "Flashpoint" achievement.

Flashpoint.name: Arachnogenesis
Flashpoint.description: Slay the champion webby mother near Ancient Hollow.

Flashpoint.name: Arrival and Survival
Flashpoint.description: Travel to Draconis Mons and investigate the cavern's interior.

Flashpoint.name: Born for Battle
Flashpoint.description: Defeat ten mercenaries during the final surge.

Flashpoint.name: Burnin' Down the House
Flashpoint.description: Destroy a mercenary turret.

Flashpoint.name: Crypt Keeper
Flashpoint.description: Find the golemancer's tomb.

Flashpoint.name: Desecration Prevention
Flashpoint.description: Slay a champion molten desecrator near Titan's Throat.

Flashpoint.name: Dinosaur King Ascension
Flashpoint.description: Slay the champion stonehead king near Heathen's Hold.

Flashpoint.name: Draconis Mons Insight: Savage Rise
Flashpoint.description: Discover this Maguuma Mastery Insight in Draconis Mons.

Flashpoint.name: Draconis Mons Insight: Scalding Gorge
Flashpoint.description: Discover this Maguuma Mastery Insight in Draconis Mons.

Flashpoint.name: Draconis Mons Insight: Western Boiling Sea
Flashpoint.description: Discover this Maguuma Mastery Insight in Draconis Mons.

Flashpoint.name: Elder Druid Protection
Flashpoint.description: Find the imprisoned druids and gain their blessings.

Flashpoint.name: Excess Energy
Flashpoint.description: Find all the lingering fragments of Primordus and Jormag energy in the Heart of the Volcano instance.

Flashpoint.name: Exfoliating
Flashpoint.description: Spend too much time swimming in the boiling sea.

Flashpoint.name: Expensive Taste
Flashpoint.description: Slay champion Emperor Mattake near Ancient Hollow.

Flashpoint.name: Fancy Flying
Flashpoint.description: Descend the chimney in the Heart of the Volcano instance without being hit by destroyer fireballs.

Flashpoint.name: Fire Fighter
Flashpoint.description: Repair three of Taimi's malfunctioning sprinklers.

Flashpoint.name: Go Nuts with the Scanning
Flashpoint.description: Find all unique objects and creatures in the Heart of the Volcano instance that respond to Taimi's scanner.

Flashpoint.name: Golemancer's Treasure
Flashpoint.description: Find the hidden chest in the golemancer's tomb.

Flashpoint.name: Heart of the Volcano
Flashpoint.description: Enter the caldera, and venture deep into the heart of the volcano.

Flashpoint.name: Hot Splashes
Flashpoint.description: Acquire diving goggles near the gate of fire, and dive into the bucket floating in the boiling sea.

Flashpoint.name: In Pursuit of a God
Flashpoint.description: Follow your foe's tracks deeper into the volcano.

Flashpoint.name: Lessons Learned
Flashpoint.description: Find all 14 of the golemancer's lost recordings in Draconis Mons.

Flashpoint.name: Nature's Wrath
Flashpoint.description: Slay the champion greater wardbough near Savage Rise.

Flashpoint.name: People Watching
Flashpoint.description: Plant scanners for the Whispers agent.

Flashpoint.name: Powerless Suit
Flashpoint.description: Destroy the champion Inquest agent in the power suit, near Rata Arcanum.

Flashpoint.name: Ring of Fire
Flashpoint.description: Avoid being hit by the ring of fire in Taimi's Pet Project.

Flashpoint.name: Rock Collector
Flashpoint.description: Collect all the stray firestone shards.

Flashpoint.name: Searing Ascent
Flashpoint.description: Complete the Searing Ascent.

Flashpoint.name: Taimi's Pet Project
Flashpoint.description: Observe Taimi's new magical device, and prepare for an unwelcome visitor.

Flashpoint.name: Terror of the Boiling Sea
Flashpoint.description: Slay either the legendary Destroyer Aestus or the legendary Destroyer Ignis near the Boiling Sea.

Flashpoint.name: White Hat
Flashpoint.description: Hack Inquest terminals.

Flashpoint.name: Wurm Slurper
Flashpoint.description: Slay the champion bloodstone-charged lava wurm in Heathen's Hold.

Gates of Maguuma.name: A Shocking Development
Gates of Maguuma.description: Use the Golemites against their master.

Gates of Maguuma.name: Dashed Advantage
Gates of Maguuma.description: Find the secret passage and secure some extra crystals for the fight.

Gates of Maguuma.name: Explosive Avoidance
Gates of Maguuma.description: Don't get hit by your enemy's timed blasts.

Gates of Maguuma.name: No Rock Unturned
Gates of Maguuma.description: Find and destroy the hidden Inquest survey equipment.

Gates of Maguuma.name: No Seraph Left Behind
Gates of Maguuma.description: Don't let any of the Seraph repair workers perish.

Gates of Maguuma.name: No Shocks Here
Gates of Maguuma.description: Don't get hit by projectiles from Static Discharge.

Gates of Maguuma.name: Opportune Moment
Gates of Maguuma.description: Find a way to sneak up on your enemy during the chase.

Gates of Maguuma.name: Zephyr's Ascent
Gates of Maguuma.description: Climb to the highest point in Prospect Valley.

Gates of Maguuma.name: Zephyr's Leap
Gates of Maguuma.description: Dive into a hay pile from the highest point in Prospect Valley and survive.

Godspawn.name: A Moment of Quiet
Godspawn.description: Check in with all of your allies following the meeting.

Godspawn.name: Any Information Is Good Information
Godspawn.description: Speak with the other Durmand Priory members about Farrah and Sestina.

Godspawn.name: Life of the Party
Godspawn.description: Speak with the other guests at the battle's eve feast.

Godspawn.name: Prying in the Priory
Godspawn.description: Find all of Farrah's clues and research findings in the library.

Godspawn.name: Study Break
Godspawn.description: Use the /ponder emote in the Durmand Priory classroom.

Godspawn.name: The Queen of Battle
Godspawn.description: Spar with Barbed Vale without being downed.

Godspawn.name: Timely Takedown
Godspawn.description: Defeat the titanspawn within the time limit.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Artful Dodger
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: When ascending the narrow path off the plateau, destroy all the Mordrem tendrils without being hit by their poison area attacks.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Conservation of Resources
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Keep the turret operational during the night attack.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Dug In
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Help the soldiers build up their defenses.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Establishing a Foothold
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Speak to Pact members for information.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Heart of Thorns Act I Mastery
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Complete all  Heart of Thorns Act I achievements.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: In Their Footsteps
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Track down missing allies.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Is A Good Offense
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Choose to go with Tizlak to attack the Mordrem Guard at their staging area before they can attack the Itzel village.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: My Friends, the Smiths
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: While traveling to the Mordrem prison camp, find and rescue the five ordnance masters from the Pact: Baroosh, Shashoo, Beigarth, Izu, and Occam.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Now That's a Fungus
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Locate the Mushroom King near the Itzel village and help the Itzel farmer defeat it so that they can bring the meat home for his soup recipe.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Peer Review
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Explore the mesas and follow the ornithologist's trail of clues to verify or disprove his hypothesis.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Prisoners of the Dragon
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Storm the Mordrem's prison camp.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Rally to Maguuma
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Rally with your allies in Maguuma.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Search and Rescue
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Help Laranthir search for prisoners.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Stick the Landing
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: When gliding down into the Mordrem prison camp, land within the marked target zone.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Sylvari Solidarity
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Help a sylvari resist Mordremoth's call.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: The Best Defense
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Choose to remain in the Itzel village to defend it against the Mordrem Guard with Ibli and Kaana Miatli.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: The Jungle Provides
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Secure help from tribespeople of the Maguuma Jungle.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Torn from the Sky
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Search for survivors in the wreckage of the Pact fleet.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Totems of the Itzel
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Help the high priest recover the totems of the Jaaka Itzel tribe that are scattered throughout the surrounding jungle after the last Mordrem Guard attack.

Heart of Thorns: Act 1.name: Weed Whacker
Heart of Thorns: Act 1.description: Defeat 30 Mordrem during the night attack.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: Avoid Traps
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: Find Taimi without stepping on any Mordrem traps.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: City of Hope
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: Prove yourself to gain access to a forgotten refuge.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: Deathless Escape
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: While being pursued by the Mordrem beast, do not die.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: Flawless Escape
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: While being pursued by the Mordrem beast, avoid taking any hit.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: Heart of Thorns Act II Mastery
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: Complete all  Heart of Thorns Act II achievements.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: Leave It to Me
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: Complete the teamwork trial without reviving any Pact soldiers.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: Mordremoth Usurper
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: Usurp the Mordrem controllers' positions and use their power to kill Mordrem wolves.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: Mushroom Conservationist
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: Help Taimi collect saurian bones without using more than 4 mushrooms.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: Never Say Die
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: Complete the trial of strength with no deaths.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: No More Time
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: Complete the trial of wits without gaining any bonus time.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: Predatory Prey
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: Defeat all enemies in the teamwork trial.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: Prized Possessions
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: Advance deeper into the jungle to continue your search.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: Strange Observations
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: Follow Taimi's trail further into the jungle.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: The Predator's Path
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: Catch up with the rest of your team.

Heart of Thorns: Act 2.name: Wild Dragon Chase
Heart of Thorns: Act 2.description: While being pursued by the Mordrem beast, find and retrieve all 23 Echoes of Glint.

Heart of Thorns: Act 3.name: An Ignoble End
Heart of Thorns: Act 3.description: Find and question the wounded Mordrem Guard on the outskirts of Rata Novus.

Heart of Thorns: Act 3.name: Buried Insight
Heart of Thorns: Act 3.description: Search for ancient research on the Elder Dragons.

Heart of Thorns: Act 3.name: Chak Killer—Beginner
